title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. stricta
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. stricta, also known as Arctic or strict blue eye-cup, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. stricta include its potential to support eye health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture, infusion, or eye drop, and can also be found in some herbal supplements and eye care products.
